content: {"file": "frontend/storyforge-ui/src/app/pages/assess/assess.component.ts", "summary": "This component handles the assessment submission process for a story forge application. It manages file uploads, form validation, and API calls to submit an assessment.", "rules": [{"name": "File Upload Validation", "description": "Ensures that only PDF files are accepted for upload.", "conditions": ["selectedFile is not null", "file.type === 'application/pdf'"], "actions": ["set selectedFile to the uploaded file"]}, {"name": "Form Submission Validation", "description": "Validates form fields and file selection before allowing submission.", "conditions": ["ppmNumber, ppmName, systemName are non-empty strings", "selectedFile is not null", "submitting is false"], "actions": ["set canSubmit to true"]}, {"name": "Assessment Submission", "description": "Submits the assessment data to the server and navigates to a status page upon success.", "conditions": ["canSubmit is true"], "actions": ["call submitAssessment with form values", "navigate to /status/job_id on successful submission", "set submitting to false and show error message on failure"]}], "dependencies": ["StoryForgeService", "Router"]}
